celldesigner:speciesIdentity.celldesigner:name: Tyrosine phosphorylated IL6 receptor hexamer:Activated JAKs:Tyrosine/serine phosphorylated STAT1/3

reaction.name: cGAS senses cytosolic dsDNA, produces second messenger cGAMP

html:body.html:p: mechanism=cGAS senses cytosolic dsDNA, produces second messenger cGAMP
ssc_relevance=cytosolic DNA sensing — driver of type-I IFN in SSc skin keratinocytes/fibroblasts

reaction.name: cGAMP binds STING (TMEM173) and triggers ER-to-Golgi trafficking + dimerisation

html:body.html:p: mechanism=cGAMP binds STING (TMEM173) and triggers ER-to-Golgi trafficking + dimerisation
ssc_relevance=STING axis activation; targeted by emerging STING inhibitors in SSc trials

reaction.name: TMEM173_active recruits and activates TBK1, which phosphorylates IRF3

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TMEM173_active recruits and activates TBK1, which phosphorylates IRF3
ssc_relevance=IRF3 nuclear translocation downstream of STING

reaction.name: Phospho-IRF3 induces IFN-β1 transcription

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=IFN-β output of cGAS-STING — drives canonical IFN signature in SSc skin

reaction.name: Endosomal dsRNA activates TLR3, which signals via TRIF (TICAM1) to phosphorylate

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Endosomal dsRNA activates TLR3, which signals via TRIF (TICAM1) to phosphorylate IRF7
ssc_relevance=endosomal nucleic-acid sensing; relevant to autoAb-immune-complex internalisation

reaction.name: TLR7/8/9 endosomal sensing activates IRF7 via MyD88

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TLR7/8/9 endosomal sensing activates IRF7 via MyD88
ssc_relevance=TLR7/9 single-stranded nucleic acid sensing; SSc autoAb-driven

reaction.name: Phospho-IRF7 induces IFN-α (IFNA1) transcription

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=IFN-α amplification loop in SSc plasmacytoid DC

reaction.name: RIG-I (DDX58) senses cytosolic dsRNA, recruits MAVS at mitochondrial outer membr

html:body.html:p: mechanism=RIG-I (DDX58) senses cytosolic dsRNA, recruits MAVS at mitochondrial outer membrane
ssc_relevance=cytosolic RNA sensing branch; relevant for endogenous RNA-driven IFN

reaction.name: DDX58:MAVS complex activates IKBKE, which phosphorylates IRF3

html:body.html:p: mechanism=DDX58:MAVS complex activates IKBKE, which phosphorylates IRF3

reaction.name: CXCL4 (PF4) primes plasmacytoid dendritic cells, amplifies IFN-α production

html:body.html:p: mechanism=CXCL4 (PF4) primes plasmacytoid dendritic cells, amplifies IFN-α production
ssc_relevance=Van Bon 2014 NEJM — flagship SSc-specific biomarker; stratifies severity

reaction.name: Activated pDC produces IFN-α

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=pDC as the source of dermal IFN-α in SSc

reaction.name: Combined ISG response (IFI44 + ISG15 + IFIT1 + IFIT3 + MX family + OAS family) c

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Combined ISG response (IFI44 + ISG15 + IFIT1 + IFIT3 + MX family + OAS family) converges on ISG signature phenotype
ssc_relevance=clinical readout — IFN signature drives the inflammatory intrinsic subset (Whitfield/Tabib)

reaction.name: Latent TGF-β1 complex (LAP + LTBP1) released from ECM via αvβ6/αvβ3 integrin con

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Latent TGF-β1 complex (LAP + LTBP1) released from ECM via αvβ6/αvβ3 integrin contraction (mechanotransduction)
ssc_relevance=TGF-β activation is rate-limiting; mechanotransduction central to SSc skin fibroblast feedback

reaction.name: Thrombospondin-1 (THBS1) alternative latent TGF-β1 activation route

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Thrombospondin-1 (THBS1) alternative latent TGF-β1 activation route
ssc_relevance=auxiliary TGF-β activation in SSc skin

reaction.name: Mature TGF-β1 binds TGFBR2 + TGFBR1 (already-imported Reactome complex represent

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Mature TGF-β1 binds TGFBR2 + TGFBR1 (already-imported Reactome complex represented as TGFB1_TGFBR2_TGFBR1__cyto)

reaction.name: Active TGFBR1 phosphorylates SMAD2 and SMAD3

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Active TGFBR1 phosphorylates SMAD2 and SMAD3

reaction.name: Phospho-SMAD3 oligomerises with SMAD4 and translocates to nucleus

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Phospho-SMAD3 oligomerises with SMAD4 and translocates to nucleus
ssc_relevance=nuclear translocation of the R-SMAD/co-SMAD complex

reaction.name: SMAD3:SMAD4 binds COL1A1 promoter SBE, induces transcription

html:body.html:p: mechanism=SMAD3:SMAD4 binds COL1A1 promoter SBE, induces transcription
ssc_relevance=primary ECM output in SSc fibroblasts; pirfenidone target

reaction.name: SMAD3:SMAD4 induces COL3A1 transcription
SMAD3:SMAD4 induces FN1 (fibronectin-EDA) transcription
SMAD3:SMAD4 induces ACTA2 (αSMA) transcription
SMAD3:SMAD4 induces CTGF (CCN2) transcription

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=matricellular amplifier; elevated in SSc skin biopsies

reaction.name: Secreted CTGF acts on fibroblast autocrine loop, amplifies pro-fibrotic state

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Secreted CTGF acts on fibroblast autocrine loop, amplifies pro-fibrotic state

reaction.name: SMAD3:SMAD4 induces POSTN transcription
SMAD3:SMAD4 induces COMP transcription
SMAD3:SMAD4 induces LOX/LOXL2 transcription

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=collagen cross-linking enzymes; LOXL2 anti-fibrotic target (simtuzumab fail but rationale stands)

reaction.name: LOX/LOXL2 cross-link collagens, stiffen ECM

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=matures fibrosis; mechanical feedback to YAP/TAZ

reaction.name: ECM stiffness activates RHOA → ROCK1/2 → YAP1/TAZ nuclear translocation

html:body.html:p: mechanism=ECM stiffness activates RHOA → ROCK1/2 → YAP1/TAZ nuclear translocation

reaction.name: Active YAP1/TAZ induces ACTA2 and CTGF transcription (parallel to SMAD)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Active YAP1/TAZ induces ACTA2 and CTGF transcription (parallel to SMAD)

reaction.name: FRA-2 (FOSL2) cooperates with SMAD/AP-1 to induce COL1A1 + ACTA2

html:body.html:p: mechanism=FRA-2 (FOSL2) cooperates with SMAD/AP-1 to induce COL1A1 + ACTA2
ssc_relevance=FRA-2 transgenic mouse phenocopies SSc skin/lung fibrosis

reaction.name: FRA-2 binds TBX2 cooperatively in SSc dermal fibroblasts

html:body.html:p: mechanism=FRA-2 binds TBX2 cooperatively in SSc dermal fibroblasts
ssc_relevance=TBX2 as a SSc-fibroblast transcriptional cofactor

reaction.name: PDGF-AA/BB binds PDGFRA/PDGFRB, drives fibroblast proliferation

html:body.html:p: mechanism=PDGF-AA/BB binds PDGFRA/PDGFRB, drives fibroblast proliferation
ssc_relevance=PDGFR signaling; nintedanib SSc-ILD target (SENSCIS positive)

reaction.name: Activated fibroblast with ACTA2+ stress fibers becomes myofibroblast

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Activated fibroblast with ACTA2+ stress fibers becomes myofibroblast

reaction.name: Sustained collagen/FN1/POSTN/COMP/CTGF/LOX deposition is ECM deposition phenotyp

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Sustained collagen/FN1/POSTN/COMP/CTGF/LOX deposition is ECM deposition phenotype

reaction.name: EDN1 secreted by endothelial cells binds EDNRA + EDNRB on VSMC and fibroblasts

html:body.html:p: mechanism=EDN1 secreted by endothelial cells binds EDNRA + EDNRB on VSMC and fibroblasts
ssc_relevance=endothelin axis; bosentan/macitentan target in SSc digital ulcers/PAH

reaction.name: EDN1:EDNRA → Gq/PLC → IP3 → cytosolic Ca²⁺ → smooth-muscle contraction (vasocons

html:body.html:p: mechanism=EDN1:EDNRA → Gq/PLC → IP3 → cytosolic Ca²⁺ → smooth-muscle contraction (vasoconstriction)
ssc_relevance=vasomotor tone; SSc Raynaud + intimal proliferation

reaction.name: eNOS (NOS3) in endothelial cells produces NO

html:body.html:p: mechanism=eNOS (NOS3) in endothelial cells produces NO
ssc_relevance=vasoprotective axis; impaired in SSc vasculopathy

reaction.name: NO activates soluble guanylate cyclase (sGC) to produce cGMP

html:body.html:p: mechanism=NO activates soluble guanylate cyclase (sGC) to produce cGMP

reaction.name: PDE5A degrades cGMP

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=sildenafil/tadalafil target in SSc Raynaud + digital ulcers

reaction.name: Hypoxia activates HIF1A, which moves to nucleus to drive transcription

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Hypoxia activates HIF1A, which moves to nucleus to drive transcription

reaction.name: HIF1A induces EDN1 and VEGFA transcription

html:body.html:p: mechanism=HIF1A induces EDN1 and VEGFA transcription

reaction.name: VEGFA binds KDR (VEGFR2) on endothelial cells

html:body.html:p: mechanism=VEGFA binds KDR (VEGFR2) on endothelial cells
ssc_relevance=endothelial maintenance; impaired angiogenesis in SSc

reaction.name: TGF-β-activated SMAD3 induces SNAI1 transcription in endothelial cells (EndMT tr

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TGF-β-activated SMAD3 induces SNAI1 transcription in endothelial cells (EndMT trigger)
ssc_relevance=canonical EndMT initiator; downstream of M2 TGF-β

reaction.name: SMAD3 + Notch (NICD1) cooperatively induce SNAI2/ZEB1/ZEB2
SNAI1/SNAI2 represses CDH5 (VE-cadherin) transcription

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=loss of endothelial identity in EndMT

reaction.name: SNAI1/SNAI2 + TGF-β induces CDH2 (N-cadherin) + FAP + FSP1 (mesenchymal markers)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=SNAI1/SNAI2 + TGF-β induces CDH2 (N-cadherin) + FAP + FSP1 (mesenchymal markers)

reaction.name: EndMT-converted endothelial cell becomes perivascular fibroblast, joins myofibro

html:body.html:p: mechanism=EndMT-converted endothelial cell becomes perivascular fibroblast, joins myofibroblast pool
ssc_relevance=bridge from M3 to M2 myofibroblast pool

reaction.name: Reduced NO + elevated EDN1 + capillary loss → vascular remodelling phenotype

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Reduced NO + elevated EDN1 + capillary loss → vascular remodelling phenotype
ssc_relevance=clinical readout: nailfold capillaroscopy giant capillaries + dropout

reaction.name: IL-4 binds IL-4Rα
IL-13 binds IL-13Rα1/IL-4Rα heterodimer

html:body.html:p: ssc_relevance=Th2 receptor; romilkimab target in SSc trials

reaction.name: IL-4R / IL-13R complexes activate JAK1/JAK2, which phosphorylate STAT6

html:body.html:p: mechanism=IL-4R / IL-13R complexes activate JAK1/JAK2, which phosphorylate STAT6
ssc_relevance=canonical STAT6 activation; pathway-defining for Th2/IL-13

reaction.name: Phospho-STAT6 dimerises and translocates to nucleus

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Phospho-STAT6 dimerises and translocates to nucleus

reaction.name: Nuclear STAT6 induces ECM gene transcription in fibroblasts (COL1A1, COL3A1, FN1

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Nuclear STAT6 induces ECM gene transcription in fibroblasts (COL1A1, COL3A1, FN1)

reaction.name: GATA3 commits naïve CD4 T cells to Th2 lineage

html:body.html:p: mechanism=GATA3 commits naïve CD4 T cells to Th2 lineage

reaction.name: BCR engagement activates CD79A/CD79B → SYK/BLK/LYN → BTK → PLCγ2

html:body.html:p: mechanism=BCR engagement activates CD79A/CD79B → SYK/BLK/LYN → BTK → PLCγ2
ssc_relevance=B-cell receptor signaling; ibrutinib (BTK inhibitor) anti-fibrotic rationale

reaction.name: CD20 (MS4A1) is the rituximab binding target on mature B cells

html:body.html:p: mechanism=CD20 (MS4A1) is the rituximab binding target on mature B cells

reaction.name: Sustained BCR + CD40-CD40L signaling induces PRDM1 (BLIMP1), XBP1, IRF4

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Sustained BCR + CD40-CD40L signaling induces PRDM1 (BLIMP1), XBP1, IRF4

reaction.name: BAFF (TNFSF13B) binds BCMA on plasma cells, promotes survival

html:body.html:p: mechanism=BAFF (TNFSF13B) binds BCMA on plasma cells, promotes survival

reaction.name: Plasma cells secrete anti-Topo-I, anti-RNApol-III, anti-CENP-A/B autoantibodies

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Plasma cells secrete anti-Topo-I, anti-RNApol-III, anti-CENP-A/B autoantibodies

reaction.name: IFN-I primes dermal fibroblasts toward pro-fibrotic transcriptional state (M1→M2

html:body.html:p: mechanism=IFN-I primes dermal fibroblasts toward pro-fibrotic transcriptional state (M1→M2)
ssc_relevance=IFN priming; modulates TGF-β-driven fibroblast response

reaction.name: CXCL4 acts directly on dermal fibroblasts (M1→M2 bypass of IFN)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=CXCL4 acts directly on dermal fibroblasts (M1→M2 bypass of IFN)
ssc_relevance=van Bon 2014 — CXCL4 → fibroblast direct effect

reaction.name: IFN-I primes pDC and B-cell class switching (M1→M4)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=IFN-I primes pDC and B-cell class switching (M1→M4)

reaction.name: IL-6 → STAT3 → pro-fibrotic fibroblast transcription (M4→M2; tocilizumab rationa

html:body.html:p: mechanism=IL-6 → STAT3 → pro-fibrotic fibroblast transcription (M4→M2; tocilizumab rationale)
ssc_relevance=focuSSced trial supports IL-6R blockade in SSc skin/lung

html:body.html:p: mechanism=IL-13/STAT6 → ECM transcription in fibroblasts (M4→M2; romilkimab rationale)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TGF-β1 from M2 drives EndMT in M3 endothelial cells (M2→M3)

reaction.name: EndMT-derived perivascular fibroblasts join myofibroblast pool (M3→M2)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=EndMT-derived perivascular fibroblasts join myofibroblast pool (M3→M2)
ssc_relevance=conceptual bridge; explains perivascular fibrosis distribution

reaction.name: TGF-β1 → CTGF autocrine amplifier loop within M2

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TGF-β1 → CTGF autocrine amplifier loop within M2

html:body.html:p: mechanism=YAP1 / TAZ co-activates mechanosensitive ECM genes including COL5A1 + TNC

reaction.name: TAZ enters the YAP1/TAZ active nuclear complex

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TAZ enters the YAP1/TAZ active nuclear complex

reaction.name: ANGPT1 binds TEK on endothelial cells, stabilises quiescent vasculature

html:body.html:p: mechanism=ANGPT1 binds TEK on endothelial cells, stabilises quiescent vasculature
ssc_relevance=vascular stabilisation; reduced in SSc skin

reaction.name: ANGPT2 competes with ANGPT1 at TEK, destabilises endothelium

html:body.html:p: mechanism=ANGPT2 competes with ANGPT1 at TEK, destabilises endothelium
ssc_relevance=Tie2 antagonism; elevated in SSc plasma

reaction.name: SNAI1/2 + TGF-β induces TWIST1 transcription (third EMT-master TF)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=SNAI1/2 + TGF-β induces TWIST1 transcription (third EMT-master TF)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=SNAI1/2 represses CDH5 + PECAM1 + VWF + TEK transcription (loss of endothelial identity)

html:body.html:p: mechanism=COX-2 (PTGS2) produces thromboxane TXA2, signals via TBXA2R for vasoconstriction

html:body.html:p: mechanism=HIF1A under hypoxia partners with ARNT in nucleus

html:body.html:p: mechanism=GATA3, TBX21, FOXP3, RORC drive Th2 / Th1 / Treg / Th17 lineage commitment respectively

reaction.name: Activated B cell BCR + CD40-CD40L → CD22 modulation and IRF4 induction

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Activated B cell BCR + CD40-CD40L → CD22 modulation and IRF4 induction

html:body.html:p: mechanism=Th1 IFN-γ + Th2 IL-4/IL-13 + Th17 IL-17 + Treg balance shapes the autoAb output
ssc_relevance=Th balance drives chronicity in SSc

reaction.name: IRF7 cytosolic phospho-form translocates to nucleus

html:body.html:p: mechanism=IRF7 cytosolic phospho-form translocates to nucleus

reaction.name: SOCS1 + PTPN2 inhibit JAK1 to dampen IFN signalling

html:body.html:p: mechanism=SOCS1 + PTPN2 inhibit JAK1 to dampen IFN signalling

html:body.html:p: mechanism=NOTCH3 receptor on smooth-muscle/pericyte engaged by ligands (cross-Notch with M3 vasculopathy)
ssc_relevance=NOTCH3 mutations cause CADASIL; pericyte axis in SSc

html:body.html:p: mechanism=TLR8 endosomal ssRNA sensing → MyD88 → IRF7
